pdg_node.statement: (total_shares: float, days: int, risk_aversion: float) -> np.ndarray
pdg_node.informal_desc: Computes the optimal share-execution trajectory over the planning horizon given risk preference.

declaration.name: computeoptimaltrajectory
declaration.type_signature: (total_shares: float, days: int, risk_aversion: float) -> np.ndarray
declaration.docstring: Computes the optimal share-execution trajectory over the planning horizon given risk preference.
declaration.conceptual_summary: Computes a monotone liquidation schedule over a finite horizon by linearly reducing remaining inventory at each step.
